meaning: adj.看的,视觉的,形象的,栩栩如生的
examples: We work on improving visual acuity.
He has a visual impairment in the right eye.
The building makes a tremendous visual impact.
Mr. FAIUMU: Obviously, in radio land they cannot see, get a visual on me.
Life of Pi also picked up Oscars for cinematography, original score and visual effects.
